adminPanel.title: Human astrologer review desk
adminPanel.body: Predicta prepares the evidence first. A verified astrologer can approve, refine, and send the answer only inside the evidence and safety contract.
adminPanel.packetBody: Every packet contains the user question, refined event question, Predicta draft, deterministic evidence, conflicts, confidence, and safety notes.
adminPanel.flowBody: The reviewer may improve judgement and wording, but every meaningful change is audited against the Predicta draft.
adminPanel.policyBody: If the SLA is missed before a reviewed response is sent, the packet becomes retry/refund eligible.
adminPanel.redlineBody: No fear-selling, forced remedies, expensive puja pressure, unsupported guarantees, or hidden human-review status.
